patent_context.patent_title: Smart irrigation controller with soil moisture feedback
patent_context.claim_description: A smart irrigation controller comprising a soil moisture sensor, a wireless communication module, and an adaptive watering schedule algorithm

claims.claim_text: A smart irrigation controller comprising a soil moisture sensor; a wireless communication module for transmitting sensor data; and an adaptive watering schedule algorithm that adjusts irrigation timing based on real-time soil moisture readings
claim_elements: wireless communication module for transmitting sensor data
adaptive watering schedule algorithm adjusting irrigation timing based on real-time soil moisture readings
claims.accused_product_description: The AquaSmart Pro controller includes a built-in soil moisture sensor, WiFi module that transmits moisture data to a cloud service, and a proprietary algorithm that dynamically adjusts watering schedules in real time based on soil moisture sensor readings.

element_mapping_facts.elem_1: Accused product contains a soil moisture sensor — matched
element_mapping_facts.elem_2: WiFi module transmits sensor data to cloud — satisfies wireless communication module
element_mapping_facts.elem_3: Proprietary algorithm adjusts irrigation timing based on real-time moisture readings — present
